title: CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTER FOR HUMAN DEVELOPMENT CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Child Outpatient services work with children presenting with problems of behavior, anxiety, depression, psychotic thinking, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, family, and group therapy that focus on strategic and structural family issues and support, trauma-related care, and wraparound services (for high-need children). 2301 Cove Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Age 18 and younger Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 962-8800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 962-8800 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income, if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Union County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8-5:30pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Family Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
